=='''Warning'''== [[File:Info-data dangerous.png|100x100px|right|link=]] '''The following document may be infected with infohazardous data caused by the secondary effects of Entity 470. If you, the reader, begin to experience irrational fear toward this document, feel as if you are being watched, or start to manifest any form of derealization, immediately cease reading this document, report the incident to the Team R-5 - "Medusa's Blindfold", and request a Type-05 medical consultation from the Team C-3 - "An Apple A Day".''' '''You have been warned.'''
==Description== ---- Entity 470, also referred to as the “False Imitator,” is described as a non-physical entity composed of innumerable intertwined filaments of ideas that collectively form its structure. This entity emerges as the archetype of the accumulated unconscious fear that an explorer retains throughout their stay in the Backrooms (which initially functions as a method of defense and adaptation against supernatural dangers). Over time, this fear manifests as severe physical and cognitive lethal attacks, as well as permanent effects on the surrounding environment, which are often classified as distortions of reality.
[[File:Miguel vs Lucifer.png|center|500x500px|link=]] {{Quote|QUIS UT DEUS!? ENTITAS QUINGENTA QUADRAGINTA TRES!?|Archangel Michael}}
One of the secondary effects of Entity 470 is its ability to generate infohazards and corrupted data that infiltrate databases and extend into the mind of any reader accessing its documentation. These data are capable of distorting the reader’s senses, inducing irrational fear toward the file, as well as auditory hallucinations and visual perceptions of non-existent phenomena. This process appears to be intended to generate panic in the explorer and accelerate the manifestation process. Such events only begin to occur when the explorer is in an advanced stage of Phase IV (see the Behavior section). ==Behavior== ---- Entity 470 exhibits a complete alienation from the concepts of kindness and empathy toward humans. In all recorded cases, Entity 470 displays absolute aggression toward the affected individual, while mysteriously refraining from attacking other people in the surrounding area. Conversely, there are no records of this entity attacking other entities. This has led to the hypothesis that human subconsciousness differs fundamentally from that of other entities, or that entities themselves do not possess a subconscious at all. The few survivors report that the effects of Entity 470 begin long before any physical attack occurs, and that the phenomenon is, in essence, a prolonged psychological torture composed of multiple phases, each potentially lasting several months. For this reason, the Team R-4 - "Major Research Organization" and the Team R-5 - "Medusa's Blindfold" has produced a document based on survivor testimonies and psychological studies. This document organizes and explains each of the phases.
Stages of Entity 470 {{Collapse|num=back2|final=
>Close document
|initial=
>Open document
|body= ----
Phenomenon 470-α: Tangible Phasic Derealization
Phenomenon 470-α is a mental anomaly that embodies raw, primordial human fear. This phenomenon is composed of several stages, ranging from the onset of abnormalities within the mind to potentially lethal physical manifestations. ---- Phase I – Bridge I→R Phase I, designated by the department as “Bridge I→R” (Irreal → Real), is the stage in which the entity begins constructing a bridge between the deep unconscious and the subconscious. At this stage, the individual experiences sporadic thoughts about things that normally lack meaning, such as geometrically deformed structures, uncorrelated words, or unknown symbols. These manifestations arise from a rupture in the conceptual layer separating the deep unconscious and the subconscious, generating low-frequency brain waves. These waves subsequently “rebound” into the conscious area and then “fall back” into the subconscious. Such collisions with the conscious mind manifest as sporadic and irrational thoughts. ---- Phase II – Oneiric Integration of the Subconscious (OIS) Phase II, termed “Oneiric Integration of the Subconscious” (OIS), is the stage at which the entity begins to appear in the explorer’s dreams. Although not always, in most cases the entity initially manifests during the N3 sleep phase. Over time, it also begins to appear during the N2 and N1 phases. The explanation for this phenomenon is that, at the onset of this phase, Entity 470 remains within the deep unconscious and, in order to access the subconscious, begins creating mental anchors in the deepest sleep phases. The deeper the sleep phase, the closer it is to the “valley of the unconscious” (see the graphic below), and the closer it is to this valley, the easier the connection between these two layers becomes. ---- [[File:InShot 20260222 220045111.jpg|center|600px|link=]] ---- During Phase II, the entity never assumes a terrifying appearance. Most commonly, it takes the form of a friend, family member, or acquaintance; in other cases, that of a complete stranger; and in some instances, that of an animated or inanimate object. This is done to “relax the subconscious” and avoid triggering alerts in the conscious mind. Many of its interactions involve engaging the explorer in conversation or assisting them with a task, although in other instances it may remain static or simply observe from a distance. This is the only phase in which the explorer can permanently erase Entity 470. If the individual manages to achieve a lucid dreaming state, they may use their oneiric faculties to manipulate the structure of the dream environment and erase Entity 470 from existence. After this, the entity will not manifest again. ---- Phase III – Subreptitious Reorientation Phase III, defined as “Subreptitious Reorientation,” occurs when the creature initiates its transition from the subconscious into the explorer’s conscious mind. This stage is described by many as deceptive, as the entity generates two divergent patterns that accelerate the manifestation process. At this stage, the creature—now with access to the prefrontal cortex—begins distorting the explorer’s mind in an almost imperceptible manner, to the point that neither the affected individual nor those around them notice it until it is too late. The explorer’s subconscious begins generating ideas that precede social isolation, even if the individual outwardly demonstrates opposite behaviors. Once isolation manifests, it is so intense that even after surviving Phase V, it does not subside for several months. This mental distortion is orchestrated by Entity 470 so that, at the moment of manifestation, it can eliminate the individual without external intervention. ---- Phase IV – Materialized Cognition Phase IV, also known as “Materialized Cognition,” is the stage at which the entity begins to manifest physically. This phase is described more as a psychological collapse than as a direct physical confrontation. During this stage, Entity 470 begins to appear in dark corners, almost merging with the environment, or as fleeting residual images in peripheral vision. This is done to activate the cerebral amygdala and the pathological fear-defense system, thereby accelerating the manifestation process. The primary issue with this phase is that Phase III remains active while Phase IV unfolds, meaning that in most cases the individual is unable to seek help due to the previously developed isolation effects. At this critical point, the only way to survive is to possess sufficient willpower to seek assistance and endure until Phase V, in which lethal force can be employed against Entity 470. ---- Phase V – Neuro-Nervous Separation, Event 470-Ω (NNSE-470-Ω) Phase V, also referred to as Neuro-Nervous Separation, Event 470-Ω (NNSE-470-Ω), is the most dangerous stage associated with Entity 470. At this point, the creature ceases to be a purely mental anomaly and manifests physically. Individuals near the area where Entity 470 appears are able to see it; however, the creature focuses exclusively on the affected individual, ignoring all others. The only exception occurs if a person other than the victim attacks Entity 470, in which case it will defend itself and counterattack. Phase V consists of several sub-stages that progressively increase the entity’s lethality. These stages are believed to result from the underlying effects of its abstract existence. Stage 1 At this stage, the explorer will feel the atmosphere become heavier and will begin to feel increasingly uneasy and watched. Stage 2 At this stage, the explorer begins to experience a strong derealization effect. Testimonies suggest that Stage 2 is a recurrent visual fragmentation phenomenon, described as a kaleidoscope of partial apparitions of Entity 470. Stage 3 At this stage, reality-distorting events begin to manifest. Survivors report that the environment starts to feel increasingly “liminal” and “abstract,” reaching a critical point where “the barrier between fiction and reality breaks.” Stage 4 Stage 4 of Phase V is the terminal point of Phenomenon 470-α. At this stage, the entity, without prior warning, lunges at the victim without mercy. Estimates suggest that Entity 470 can reach speeds of up to 50 km/h at this stage, rendering any attempt at escape by the explorer unviable. Subsequent investigations reveal that after executing its attack (whether successful or not), Entity 470 disappears completely from the scene. If the individual does not survive, only dismembered remains are found—most commonly remnants of the brain and nervous system. '''Reminder:''' At this point, attempting to engage in friendly dialogue or flee from Entity 470 is entirely futile. Entity 470 possesses no sympathy or benevolence toward humans and far surpasses human capabilities. The best possible course of action is to contact the Team D-1 - "Arminius Squadron" and prepare to confront Entity 470. ---- Overall, Phenomenon 470-α consists of the systematic control and destruction of all mental areas of the individual. The total transition time between Phase I and Phase V varies, but estimates suggest a period ranging from 7 months to 2 years and 2 months.
...
{{Quote|God is dead — and this demon has killed Him.}} }}
==Protocol== ----
What to Do: •If you detect Entity 470 within your dreams: achieve lucid dreaming in order to permanently erase the creature. •Confront your deepest fears to reduce the influence of Entity 470 on reality. •If you find yourself in Phase V, seek help immediately and prepare to face Entity 470. •If you perceive an unusual change in any of your acquaintances, to the point of isolation, contact the Team D-1 - "Arminius Squadron". They will handle the individual. ---- What Not to Do: •Attempt to eradicate your fears. Fear is a defense mechanism directly connected to the human psyche; therefore, attempting to eliminate it is completely useless. •Do not seek help from acquaintances. •Do not fail to prepare to confront Entity 470 if you are in an advanced stage.
==Encounters== ---- This section presents four archived cases of direct interactions with Entity 470. These four cases, along with others not displayed, were grouped, organized, archived, and approved by the Team R-5 - "Medusa's Blindfold", Team R-6 - "Midnight Library" and Team R-4 - "Major Research Organization".

'''May they rest in peace.'''
[[File:MEGNOTICES.png|center|link=]] }}
==Theories== ===Theory of the Disconnection of the Unconscious=== ---- One of the most widely accepted hypotheses within the scientific community regarding Entity 470 is a speculation known as the “Disconnection of the Unconscious.” This hypothesis proposes that among the innumerable ideas that exist within the deep unconscious, fear is the only one capable of filtering through mental layers and reaching base reality. The justification for this lies in the fact that the accumulated fear experienced within the Backrooms far exceeds that of any other environment. This extreme accumulation of fear generates a corrupt conceptual anomaly, causing a slippage between the deep unconscious and base reality, thus allowing these arbitrary concepts to manifest physically within reality. [[File:Complex math 4.jpg|center|400px|link=]] According to this hypothesis, fear is the only concept capable of manifesting in higher layers due to its overwhelming influence on reality. This connection is strong enough to neutralize and override the subconscious defense mechanisms (repression, denial, rationalization, etc.). This would explain why fear is the only idea capable of filtering through these layers. Based on this, the scientist Ignazio Castiglione, a researcher at the Team R-4 - "Major Research Organization", proposes the following hypothesis:
''If the idea of fear is capable of filtering out from a dreamlike space and manifesting within reality, then by logical deduction, other abstract ideas should also be capable of manifesting within our reality if their influence is sufficiently amplified.'' ''“We could use meta-Ω-reality-S to create a controlled area capable of distorting the mind of anyone within it through memetic agents. These memetic agents would distort both the conscious and subconscious of the individual, manipulating their archetypal thoughts—such as belief, ideology, worldview, and culture—in relation to the concept we wish to manifest.''
Although plausible, the consensus argues that subjecting and forcibly altering the human mind violates predetermined ethical values. As a result, the execution of this plan has been strictly prohibited. In general, despite remaining a theoretical assumption, the Theory of the Disconnection of the Unconscious is considered by many to be sufficiently logical to be regarded as credible. ===True Neutral Hypothesis=== ---- The “True Neutral Hypothesis” is a proposal developed as an elaborate counterargument intended to refute the claim that Entity 470 possesses a distorted moral compass. This hypothesis asserts that Entity 470 does not possess a moral framework of good or evil, and instead acts solely in accordance with its intrinsic nature. The arguments presented by supporters of this hypothesis include claims such as: ''"Entity 470, being an abstract idea, possesses no moral sense,"'' and ''"Entity 470 originates from a domain where concepts of good and evil do not apply."'' This hypothesis is considered more philosophical and moral than scientific and remains one of the most frequently debated topics within the discussion sector of our facilities. ==Discovery== ---- In the earliest records (XX/XX/2018) of Entity 470, scientists believed it to be merely a mental construct created by the brain, serving as a defense and adaptation mechanism against the superhuman anomalies of the Backrooms. This assumption was reinforced by recurring cases of post-traumatic stress archived in the database, most of which corresponded to explorers returning from hazardous levels. Individuals who mysteriously disappeared only to later be found dead were considered isolated cases, which were subsequently archived and forgotten within the database. However, in the year 2020, a scientist named Rubén Jaimez reopened the case after detecting certain patterns and anomalies within the previous records. Following an extensive process of data collection and organization, Rubén identified inconsistencies significant enough to cast doubt on the validity of the attached information. With this new insight, Rubén assembled an exploration team led by a man of Norwegian origin named Néstor Cáceres. He and his team were tasked with gathering additional information, comparing the developmental stages of victims with individuals exhibiting similar symptoms, and actively tracking them in search of answers. Rubén Jaimez designated this recurring pattern as “Mysterious Alienation.” Months later, Néstor and his team returned to the facilities where Rubén was working with a critical discovery: the first recorded photographs of Entity 470. Following this finding, Rubén, using the newly obtained information, published a document in 2021 titled “Entity 470, False Imitator,” which included all written evidence supporting the existence of Entity 470, along with photographs, videos, and audio recordings that substantiated its authenticity. That same year, Rubén Jaimez was awarded the Medal of Honor by the Team R-4 - "Major Research Organization" , while Néstor Cáceres and his team received a Medal of Honor granted by the Team D-1 - "Arminius Squadron". ---- . .. ...
For some, it is a network of mimetic ideas emerging from the deep unconscious. But for me… it is damn evil incarnate.
